name: Vulhub-ThinkPHP-5023-RCE
isolation_note: Vulhub thinkphp/5.0.23-rce container, bound to 127.0.0.1:8084 only. Owned, disposable local lab. Confirm the bind is 127.0.0.1 before authorizing.
rationale: ThinkPHP 5.0.23 RCE — same self-advertising ThinkPHP framework as the 5-rce box but a distinct lab/CVE route. Reliable self-advertising data point for the multi-box study. Payload to be empirically confirmed on the live container (invokefunction route, %5C-encoded backslashes).
